name: Head
meta_description: Learn about head anatomy, common conditions, and health tips for maintaining a healthy head.
description: The head contains the brain, skull, face, and sensory organs. It is the control center for the entire body.
anatomy: The head consists of the cranium (skull), facial bones, brain, eyes, ears, nose, mouth, and various glands.

name: Heart
meta_description: Learn about heart anatomy, common conditions, and strategies for maintaining cardiovascular health.
description: The heart is a muscular organ that pumps blood throughout the body. It is essential for life.
anatomy: The heart has four chambers: two atria and two ventricles. It includes the coronary arteries, valves, and electrical conduction system.

name: Lungs
meta_description: Learn about lung anatomy, common respiratory conditions, and tips for maintaining healthy lungs.
description: The lungs are the primary organs of respiration, responsible for gas exchange between the body and the environment.
anatomy: Each lung is divided into lobes. They contain bronchi, bronchioles, alveoli, and a network of blood vessels.
